description.ko: 극한의 압력 환경을 위해 설계된 최첨단 심해 잠수정으로, 생물 발광 조명과 고급 음파 탐지 매핑 기술을 갖추고 있습니다.
description.en: A state-of-the-art deep-sea submersible designed for extreme pressure environments, featuring bioluminescent lighting and advanced sonar mapping technology.

prompt: A futuristic deep-sea exploration vessel, AQUA-5, navigating through a dark underwater trench. Glowing blue bioluminescent details, robotic arms, high-tech sensors, surrounded by strange deep-sea creatures and volcanic vents, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic style.
